coreResponsibility.description: A playback engine adapter/plugin that integrates YouTube video playback capabilities into the Kaltura PlayKit JS Player ecosystem, enabling embedded YouTube content to be played through the unified Kaltura Player interface.

featureOwnership: YouTube iframe API integration and lifecycle management
YouTube video playback control (play, pause, seek, volume)
YouTube player state change event handling and normalization to PlayKit events
Video quality/track selection for YouTube content
Playback rate control for YouTube videos
Timed metadata track support for YouTube content
dataHandling: YouTube player state machine (UNSTARTED, ENDED, PLAYING, PAUSED, BUFFERING, CUED)
Video tracks (quality levels from YouTube API)
Text tracks and timed metadata cues

upstream.name: @playkit-js/playkit-js
upstream.description: Core PlayKit player providing base engine interface (IEngine), event system, track types, and utilities

upstream.name: @playkit-js/kaltura-player-js
upstream.description: Main Kaltura Player providing BasePlugin class, UI components, and plugin registration

upstream.name: playkit-timeline
upstream.description: Timeline service for chapter/cue point management

downstream.name: Kaltura Player UI
downstream.description: Consumes player events and state for rendering playback controls

downstream.name: Any application using Kaltura Player with YouTube entries
downstream.description: End-user applications playing YouTube content through Kaltura

externalAPIs.name: YouTube IFrame Player API
externalAPIs.description: Primary external SDK for controlling embedded YouTube video playback

entryPoints.description: Main entry point - exports Engine, Plugin, registers the YouTube engine and plugin
Core YouTube engine implementation - implements IEngine interface, handles all YouTube iframe API interactions
YouTube plugin for UI customizations and timeline/chapter integration

errorPatterns.description: Failed to load the YouTube iframe API script
YouTube API error - invalid video ID or parameters

errorPatterns.pattern: Error while trying to play the video
errorPatterns.description: YouTube API error - HTML5 player error
YouTube API error - video removed or private

errorPatterns.pattern: does not allow it to be played in embedded players
errorPatterns.description: YouTube API error - embedding disabled by video owner
